search.output: [search.pageComponentList[commonData.isYouku=1 or commonData.hasYouku=1].commonData.{ 'providerIds': { 'showId': showId }, 'title': $replace(titleDTO.displayName, /<[^>]+>/, '') ~> $replace(/【.+?】/, '') ~> $trim, 'type': cats, 'year': $number($regexExtract(feature, '([12][890][0-9][0-9])')), 'imageUrl': posterDTO.vThumbUrl, 'episodeCount': episodeTotal }[providerIds.showId]]
